Container.Name: TuneLog-Frontend
Container.Overview: TuneLog web dashboard — view listening stats, manage users, control library sync and trigger playlist generation. Requires TuneLog-Backend to be running.

Config.Name: Frontend Port
Config.Description: Port for the TuneLog web dashboard.

Config.Name: Backend URL
Config.Description: URL of the TuneLog backend. Use your Unraid IP. Example: http://192.168.1.80:8000
